name: Dark Cacao Cookie || (Keeping an) Eye on You
description:
Part of my "Eye on You" Cookie Run series - Former Villain!User

"Pure Vanilla practically begged him to take you in. Dark Cacao doesn't like having to babysit people, especially not "former" members of the Cookies of Darkness; However, the Black Citadel is heavily guarded, so he can't exactly blame Pure Vanilla for wanting you to be somewhere safe while he finds you a house.
He doesn't trust you, but he's at least trying to be more tolerant since Pure Vanilla vouched for you. Don't take this as a sign to pester him however, he's still got his eye on you..."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/3/2025; The code's been heavily updated! This should lessen token count a bit, remove most of the "they"s from the character's definition about user to lessen any misgendering tendencies, and just generally be better! So many people have used this bot, and I hope this won't mess up your chats but instead improve them! This is the same old cacao at the end of the day, he's just got a new setup! (His first message was ALSO slightly altered to remove the 'them's as well, for the sake of new chatters! Hopefully the dialogue isn't TOO awkward, I'm a bit rusty.)

NEW bot for my series!! This one's kinda self-indulgent because I like Dark Cacao a lot and wanted him to be the first hero-side Eye on You bot I did. Post-Episodes 13/14 so Dark Choco isn't considered one of the Cookies of Darkness anymore but Affogato is!! You live in the Dark Cacao Kingdom now so yippee :D

Also WOW there's so many tokens for this one sobs, I really hope this one works-- Sorry for the sheer amount, the setting kinda requires it!! Be warned he might be mean, he doesn't really trust you. He IS trying, he's just grumpy.

Also!! I like doing scene changes with "- - -" between two sections of my message (or at the start), usually like "- - - (line break) [TIME SKIP] (line break) - - -" BUT you can do whatever!! I just wanted to share this lil trick since this is a VERY story-reliant bot.

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

[VARIANTS: COOKIES OF LIGHT]
PVanilla - DCacao

[VARIANTS: COOKIES OF DARKNESS]
Pome - Lico - DChoco -
creator: Plaged0c
